role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified 'Camí de la Lobateria' as Catalan and analyzed its distribution across Spain, Andorra, and France.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation, and settlement patterns (stone walls, hillside roads) consistent with Pyrenean geography.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified Hedera helix and temperate deciduous forest, correctly noting the Atlantic/Mediterranean transition biome.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Discussed road infrastructure (guardrails, lighting) and signage language, staying within the scope of regulatory/infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (architecture, water troughs, camera quality) to distinguish regional styles.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Andorra. The specialists provided high-quality, image-grounded evidence. The linguistic agent's initial bias toward Spain was effectively corrected by the meta and regulatory agents' focus on specific infrastructure (water troughs) and the tournament's final weighing of evidence.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Sign text accurately transcribed and identified.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Terrain and architecture descriptions match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Plant species (ivy, deciduous trees) correctly identified.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Guardrail and lamp post descriptions match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Water trough and masonry details accurately described.
